name: Misfit Minds
oneLine: Australian prank duo/trio behind one of the country's biggest YouTube channels.
bio: Misfit Minds is an Australian prank channel run by Seb and Will, with Sam also part of the team, and is frequently described as the biggest YouTube channel in Australia in its category. The channel focuses on real public pranks - bits like serving deliberately bad beer or pranking the country with a fake celebrity - with the team emphasising authentic, in-the-wild reactions over staged setups. They have also discussed handling backlash and influences such as Chris Lilley in podcast appearances.
style: Mid-length YouTube prank videos plus shorts and Instagram clips
notable: 'We pranked Australia with a fake celebrity'
